text:
net graduation_speaks "Speaks graduation fragment"

(request_in) -speak_req-> [start] -speak_token-> (in_flight)
(in_flight) -speak_token->0 [start]
(work) -speak_work->0 [start]
[start] -speak_work-> (work)
(work) -speak_work-> [finish] -utterance-> (utterance_out)
(in_flight) -speak_token-> [finish]

(request_in) port input speak_req
(utterance_out) port output utterance

[start] handler "start@speaks"
[finish] handler "finish@speaks"
